scope.selection_note: Focused community-board duplicate guard prep for generic numbered Community Board identity-key collisions where current canonical records show different borough-scoped community boards.
scope.write_limit: Exactly one artifact was written: data/review_notes/codex-identity-community-board-dnm-218-prep.json. No merges.json, do-not-merge.json, LOG.md, submissions, canonical JSONL, canonical.db, materialized outputs, export outputs, validate outputs, or wiki files were edited.

deterministic_inspection.purpose: Read current canonical community-board entity records and their evidence refs.
Read current do-not-merge overrides to avoid proposing duplicate direct rows.
deterministic_inspection.result: Existing related DNM rows already cover several narrow or non-Manhattan community-board collisions, including Bronx CB4/CB5 against older one-source Manhattan CB4/CB5 records; this artifact proposes only direct rows absent from current overrides.

deterministic_inspection.purpose: Read prior community-board identity prep notes.
deterministic_inspection.result: Prior notes support borough-scoped community-board handling: same-borough board records may merge when evidence aligns, while same-number boards across boroughs should receive DNM guards.

deterministic_inspection.purpose: Read-only identity-key scan over current canonical entity JSONL using the deterministic identityKeysForRecord function, without invoking validate.
deterministic_inspection.result: Selected five direct pairs currently share generic Community Board keys and have no direct current DNM row.

display_name 'Manhattan Community Board 4'; payload entity_name 'Manhattan Community Board 4'; aliases include entity_community-board-4 and entity_community-board-4-manhattan.

proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: Shared generic Community Board 4 key but different borough-scoped boards: Bronx CB4 versus Manhattan CB4. These are distinct real-world community boards and should not merge.

proposed_durable_mutation_row.reason: Shared generic Community Board 4 key but different borough/scope: Bronx versus Manhattan.
